Destination.title: Destination
Destination.description: Defines the data model for a travel destination featured on the website. Each destination includes essential information for presentation on the UI.

name.description: The official name of the travel destination (e.g., 'Dharamshala').

description.description: A comprehensive, paragraph-long summary of the destination. This should detail key attractions, cultural significance, and unique experiences to entice potential travelers.

imageUrl.description: A fully-qualified URL for a high-quality, representative image of the destination.

category.description: The primary category of the destination (e.g., 'Hill Station', 'Adventure', 'Pilgrimage').

bestTimeToVisit.description: A concise description of the ideal season or months to visit (e.g., 'March to June').

attractions.description: A list of key attractions or things to do at the destination.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Defines the data model for a vehicle service offered by the company. This includes details about the vehicle, its features, and pricing information.

name.description: The official name of the service, including the vehicle type (e.g., 'Taxi Service (Sedan)', 'Innova / SUV').

description.description: A detailed description of the service, outlining its benefits, suitable use cases, and what is included in the offering.

pricing.description: A user-friendly string that clearly communicates the pricing model (e.g., 'From ₹15/km', 'Contact for Price').

imageUrl.description: A fully-qualified URL for a high-quality image of the vehicle associated with the service.

capacity.description: The maximum passenger capacity of the vehicle (e.g., 'Up to 4 passengers').

features.description: A list of key amenities and features available with the vehicle (e.g., 'Air Conditioning', 'Music System').

idealFor.description: A concise description of the ideal travel scenario or group for this service (e.g., 'Solo travelers and small families').

ContactFormSubmission.title: ContactFormSubmission
ContactFormSubmission.description: Defines the data model for a user-submitted contact form entry. This schema captures all necessary fields from the website's contact form.

name.description: The full name of the individual submitting the form.

email.description: The email address provided by the user for correspondence.

subject.description: The subject line of the user's inquiry or message.

message.description: The main body content of the message submitted by the user.

submissionDate.description: An ISO 8601 formatted timestamp indicating the exact date and time of the form submission (e.g., '2024-07-25T10:30:00Z').

/destinations/{destinationId}.description: Stores all travel destination documents, making them available for display on the website.

/services/{serviceId}.description: Stores all vehicle service documents, detailing the fleet available to customers.

/contact_form_submissions/{submissionId}.description: A write-only collection that serves as a secure repository for user inquiries submitted via the contact form.
